subcodes.first_line: It is the day of the Festival of Naw-Rúz. Our festivals are exceedingly great; among all the peoples of the world, they are without peer
subcodes.first_line_orig: روز عید نوروز است اعیاد ما خیلی عظیم است در میان جمیع ملل نظیری ندارد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @wealth inequality and its moderation
